prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次后移趋势、2026年计划缩招约12 .9%及本省物理类考生小幅减少，考虑学校排名上升和上海地域吸引力部分抵消缩招效应，预测最低位次约8150名，区间7650–8650名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 7637 → 7870 → 6423 → 7542 → 8869, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1327 positions in the last two years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 8869; provincial science enrollment plans from 2021 to 2024 were 53, 53, 47, and 53 respectively, and in 2025 (physics category) it significantly increased to 70; the 2026 plan is 61, a reduction of about 12.9% compared to 2025, slightly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science main ranking has been stable at 44–45 in recent years, rising to 42nd in 2026, a slight improvement; in 2022, there was negative public opinion due to a campus safety incident, but reputation has been stable in recent years; Douyin popularity ranking is 34th (relatively hot), with 15 videos having a combined popularity of about 1.32 million, indicating moderate attention; Chemical Engineering and Technology is A+ (flagship), Chemistry is A-, and Control Science and Engineering is A-, highly correlated with the university's enrollment majors such as Electronic Information and Engineering Experimental Class (Smart Chemical Engineering / Intelligent and Robotics).

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation, and Computer Science are highly popular and recommended, with competition for related majors continuing to heat up; the province's 2026 physics category examinees are 167,419, a decrease of about 3.4% from 2025, slightly easing competition; East China University of Science and Technology is located in Shanghai, a first-tier city with strong regional appeal, maintaining continuous attraction for Shanxi examinees; the university's enrollment in Shanxi has been increasing in recent years (total enrollment of 28 in 2025, accounting for about 4.7%).

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the backward trend of the 2025 baseline ranking, the 2026 plan reduction of about 12.9%, and the slight decrease in the province's physics category examinees, along with the university's rising ranking and Shanghai's regional appeal partially offsetting the enrollment reduction effect, the predicted minimum ranking is about 8150, with a range of 7650–8650.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 7650–8650, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 7650), you can focus on impacting Tier 1 majors such as Engineering Experimental Class (Intelligent and Robotics) and Electronic Information Class; if your ranking is near the upper limit of the range (around 8650), you should mainly choose Tier 3 majors, while also considering Tier 2 majors with lower rankings.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts (history category) were approximately 1761 → 1549 → 1525 → 4635 → 2074, with a significant drop in 2024 (about 4635) and a recovery to 2074 in 2025, showing large fluctuations; the baseline for 2025 is about 2074; the provincial liberal arts enrollment plan from 2021 to 2025 and 2026 is 4 students each year, with an extremely small scale and stable competition for 6 consecutive years.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; ranked 42nd in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with a stable upward trend in recent years; experienced negative public opinion due to a campus safety incident in 2022, but reputation has stabilized in recent years; Douyin popularity ranking 34th (relatively hot), with moderate attention; East China University of Science and Technology's advantageous disciplines are concentrated in engineering fields such as chemical engineering, chemistry, and control, while its liberal arts majors (Law, Foreign Language and Literature) have low correlation with the university's strengths.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text:
Law has relatively high social popularity (recommended), Foreign Language and Literature has average social popularity (wait-and-see); in 2026, the number of history category examinees in the province is 63,113, a significant decrease of about 25.6% from 84,879 in 2025, greatly easing competition.
7. [Regional Factor] East China University of Science and Technology is located in Shanghai, a first-tier city with strong regional appeal, also attractive to liberal arts examinees; the university enrolls very few liberal arts students in Shanxi (only 4 per year), making ranking fluctuations easily affected by decisions of a few high-scoring examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 2074, the stable enrollment plan, the significant decrease of about 25.6% in provincial history category examinees, and Shanghai's regional appeal, the predicted minimum ranking is about 2044, with a range of 1737–2351.
